title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the purpose and future of education.

questions.question: Do you think the main purpose of education is to prepare people for work, or does it have a broader purpose?
Should university education be free for all students? Why?

script.text: Do you think the main purpose of education is to prepare people for work, or does it have a broader purpose?
Should university education be free for all students? Why?
Some people argue that exams and grades put too much pressure on young people. Do you agree with this view?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
